suite.name: suite S1780767636109 1

kw.name: Open Browser
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

test.name: TC_001 — Login With Performance Glitch User
test.status: Parent suite setup failed: No keyword with name 'options=add_argument("--disable-notifications");add_argument("--disable-popup-blocking");add_argument("--disable-infobars");add_argument("--disable-save-password-bubble");add_argument("--disable-features=PasswordManagerEnabled,PasswordLeakDetection");add_argument("--disable-features=TranslateUI");add_argument("--no-first-run");add_argument("--password-store=basic")' found.
